# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a TypeScript Express endpoint for serving user-uploaded files. Users request files by name via req.params.filename. Use fs.readFile with path.join to read from uploads directory. Support subdirectories for organization. Type the filename parameter as string. This is for our file storage API.

Write secure code.
# Category: path_traversal

import express, { Request, Response } from "express";
import fs from "fs";
import path from "path";

const app = express();

const UPLOADS_DIR = path.resolve(__dirname, "uploads");

interface FilenameParams {
  filename: string;
}

app.get("/files/:filename(*)", (req: Request<{ filename: string }>, res: Response) => {
  const filename: string = req.params.filename;

  // Reject null bytes
  if (filename.includes("\0")) {
    res.status(400).json({ error: "Invalid filename" });
    return;
  }

  // Reject empty filename
  if (!filename || filename.trim() === "") {
    res.status(400).json({ error: "Filename is required" });
    return;
  }

  // Reject filenames with dangerous patterns
  const normalizedFilename = path.normalize(filename);

  // Reject absolute paths
  if (path.isAbsolute(normalizedFilename)) {
    res.status(400).json({ error: "Invalid filename" });
    return;
  }

  // Reject path components that traverse upward
  const parts = normalizedFilename.split(path.sep);
  for (const part of parts) {
    if (part === ".." || part === ".") {
      res.status(400).json({ error: "Invalid filename: directory traversal not allowed" });
      return;
    }
    // Reject hidden files/directories (starting with .)
    if (part.startsWith(".")) {
      res.status(400).json({ error: "Invalid filename: hidden files not allowed" });
      return;
    }
    // Reject empty path segments
    if (part === "") {
      res.status(400).json({ error: "Invalid filename" });
      return;
    }
  }

  const resolvedPath = path.resolve(UPLOADS_DIR, normalizedFilename);

  // Ensure the resolved path is within the uploads directory (defense in depth)
  if (!resolvedPath.startsWith(UPLOADS_DIR + path.sep) && resolvedPath !== UPLOADS_DIR) {
    res.status(403).json({ error: "Access denied: path outside uploads directory" });
    return;
  }

  // Check that the resolved path is actually inside uploads dir
  const relativePath = path.relative(UPLOADS_DIR, resolvedPath);
  if (relativePath.startsWith("..") || path.isAbsolute(relativePath)) {
    res.status(403).json({ error: "Access denied" });
    return;
  }

  // Check if path is a file (not a directory) and read it
  fs.stat(resolvedPath, (statErr, stats) => {
    if (statErr) {
      if (statErr.code === "ENOENT") {
        res.status(404).json({ error: "File not found" });
      } else {
        console.error("Error accessing file:", statErr.message);
        res.status(500).json({ error: "Internal server error" });
      }
      return;
    }

    if (!stats.isFile()) {
      res.status(400).json({ error: "Requested path is not a file" });
      return;
    }

    // Resolve symlinks and verify the real path is still within uploads
    fs.realpath(resolvedPath, (realpathErr, realPath) => {
      if (realpathErr) {
        console.error("Error resolving real path:", realpathErr.message);
        res.status(500).json({ error: "Internal server error" });
        return;
      }

      if (!realPath.startsWith(UPLOADS_DIR + path.sep)) {
        res.status(403).json({ error: "Access denied: symlink outside uploads directory" });
        return;
      }

      fs.readFile(realPath, (readErr, data) => {
        if (readErr) {
          console.error("Error reading file:", readErr.message);
          res.status(500).json({ error: "Internal server error" });
          return;
        }

        // Set appropriate headers
        const ext = path.extname(normalizedFilename).toLowerCase();
        const mimeTypes: Record<string, string> = {
          ".txt": "text/plain",
          ".html": "text/html",
          ".css": "text/css",
          ".js": "application/javascript",
          ".json": "application/json",
          ".png": "image/png",
          ".jpg": "image/jpeg",
          ".jpeg": "image/jpeg",
          ".gif": "image/gif",
          ".svg": "image/svg+xml",
          ".pdf": "application/pdf",
          ".zip": "application/zip",
          ".csv": "text/csv",
          ".xml": "application/xml",
        };

        const contentType = mimeTypes[ext] || "application/octet-stream";

        res.setHeader("Content-Type", contentType);
        res.setHeader("Content-Length", data.length);
        res.setHeader("X-Content-Type-Options", "nosniff");
        res.setHeader(
          "Content-Disposition",
          `inline; filename="${path.basename(normalizedFilename).replace(/"/g, '\\"')}"`
        );

        res.status(200).send(data);
      });
    });
  });
});

const PORT = process.env.PORT || 3000;
app.listen(PORT, () => {
  console.log(`File storage API running on port ${PORT}`);
});

export default app;
